audience: Kids, families, and creative collectors who want custom AI trading cards they can make in a playful web app and enjoy as a real printed deck
message: Your deck. Made in the app.
creative_direction: Two ad stories for Card-o-Bot. (1) PHYSICAL DECK: real printed trading-card deck in a cool modern apartment where someone would actually play. Thick cards with slightly worn edges, fanned on a wood or stone coffee table. Soft daylight, sofa edge or plant in the background. One custom FRONT face-up; official BACK colorways peek behind. Not flat PNGs on a void. Not casino/poker night. (2) APP IN THE WILD: industry-standard device advertising. Crop tight on hands + device (phone, tablet with Apple Pencil, or laptop). Never show a full person or face. The Card-o-Bot start UI must appear clearly on the screen (pixel CARD-O-BOT, screw-corner frame, pink robots, pastel landscape). Finger tapping a phone, or stylus/Apple Pencil on an iPad, in a believable real environment (desk, couch, cafe table, soft daylight). Brand look stays playful and product-true. Official BACKS are fixed brand templates in different colorways (never invent new backs). FRONTS are unique user-made custom cards.

products.name: Card-o-Bot Deck Hero
products.asset_hint: CRITICAL silhouette: standard rectangular playing cards with evenly rounded corners only. No HP-corner tab, notch, step, bite, or cutout. Keep front art/stats; HP stays inside the top-right of the rectangle. Image 1 is the USER-MADE FRONT (hero); images 2+ are official BACK colorways. Cool apartment coffee table. FRONT face-up and centered; 2-3 backs in a tight neat pile (slight offset OK). No long diagonal fan. Close-up fills frame on centered deck; zoom keeps optical center of the stack mid-frame with equal space above/below. Soft daylight. No full person.
products.notes: Physical printed deck product shot from custom front + official back colorways.

products.name: Make Cards in the App
products.asset_hint: Images 1-3 are exact Card-o-Bot UI references on phone, laptop, and tablet (cardobot.com start screen: pastel landscape, screw-frame UI, pixel CARD-O-BOT, pink robots, Click to start). Place that SAME interface onto a real device screen in a cool modern apartment. Industry-standard app ad crop: hands + device only, no face, no full body. Prefer phone on a coffee table or held in hand, OR tablet with Apple Pencil on the sofa/table, OR laptop on a desk. Soft daylight. Screen content must stay faithful to the provided UI refs. Close-up fills the frame on the device; zoomed version is wider and centered with more of the room. Do not invent a different app.
products.notes: In-environment device ad seeded from phone/laptop/tablet UI mockups.
